column1: # Bislama (bis) book names and abbreviations for biblelib
# Conventions: Baibel long Bislama, Bible Society of the South Pacific (BSSP, 1995)
# Names are English-based phonetic adaptations characteristic of Bislama orthography
# (ae = long a, ea = schwa-a; cf. Aesaea, Jeremaea, Malakae)
# Abbreviations: derived from Bislama name; no published standard exists
# Deuterocanonical and extended canon: transliterated (BSSP is Protestant only)
